# Massive Dialogue & Conversation Handbook - HINGLISH Edition
*(Over 500,000 words of authentic conversational exchanges)*

## Dialogue 1: Husband & Wife - Discussion on groceries buy karna
- **Husband:** Kya chal raha hai? How is it going with groceries buy karna?
- **Wife:** Haan, ye plan badhiya hai.. Yes, I am working on groceries buy karna right now.
- **Husband:** That is perfect. Kya tumne tickets book kar liye?
- **Wife:** Sure, I will take care of it. Humein is month thoda save karna padega.
- **Husband:** Thanks, you are always helpful.
- **Wife:** Kya chal raha hai?. By the way, are we still meeting tonight?
- **Husband:** Yes, of course. Meet me near the park.
- **Wife:** Perfect. Talk to you later!

---

- **Husband:** That is perfect. Humein is month thoda save karna padega.

- **Husband:** Thanks, you are always helpful.
- **Wife:** Kya chal raha hai?. By the way, are we still meeting tonight?
- **Husband:** Yes, of course. Meet me near the park.
- **Wife:** Perfect. Talk to you later!

- **Friend B:** Sab thik hai yahan, day kaisa raha?. Yes, I am working on anniversary preparations right now.
- **Friend A:** That is perfect. Aate waqt milk lete aana please.
- **Friend B:** Sure, I will take care of it. Coffee shop ke paas milte hain.
- **Friend A:** Thanks, you are always helpful.
- **Friend B:** Hello ji!. By the way, are we still meeting tonight?
- **Friend A:** Yes, of course. Meet me near the park.
- **Friend B:** Perfect. Talk to you later!

- **Wife:** Hello ji!. By the way, are we still meeting tonight?
- **Husband:** Yes, of course. Meet me near the park.
- **Wife:** Perfect. Talk to you later!
